docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$59.50) SERVED MAR-10-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VLASAKAKIS, ARGYRIOS
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT VLASAKAKIS, ARGYRIOS ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-08-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-05-2010 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT VLASAKAKIS, ARGYRIOS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,810.00 FILED BY KASSANIS, GEORGE AS TO DEFENDANT VLASAKAKIS, ARGYRIOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-2010 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (15 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF KASSANIS, GEORGE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-05-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-05-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTUFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-05-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KASSANIS, GEORGE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VLASAKAKIS, ARGYRIOS $1,641.08 PRINCIPAL, $117.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,758.08, IF PLAINTIFF HAS ACCEPTED DEFENDANT'S PREVIOUS PAYMENT OF $782.87, DEFENDANT SHALL RECEIVE CREDIT AGAINST THIS JUDGMENT FOR THAT PAYMENT. THE JUDGMENT INCLUDES A RENT ADJUSTMENT OF $50.00 PER MONTH, BASED ON CONSIDERATION OF DEFENDANT'S USE OF THE PARKING SPACE, AND DEFENDANT'S PROVIDING AMENITIES IN THE COMMON AREAS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
